---
id: select-existing-language
title: "Pair existing language"
description: "Sets existing language to pair with language to import. Data will be imported to selected existing language when applied."
sidebar_label: "Pair existing language"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Pair existing language"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/import/result/languages/{importLanguageId}/select-existing/{existingLanguageId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Sets existing language to pair with language to import. Data will be imported to selected existing language when applied.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
